title: In the Fog I
meaning_summary: In the Fog I keeps earning as part of Tim Hecker's long-tail ambient catalog, where listener depth matters more than mass scale.
revenue_drivers: Specialist streaming continues through experimental and ambient listening contexts.
Long-form album discovery supports deep-catalog replay.
The track benefits from sustained critical and community recognition.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from niche streaming depth and creator-leaning experimental-catalog economics.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-side distribution and creator-affiliated control
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears concentrated around the composer side
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
